top_signals.title: Maersk, Hapag-Lloyd Eyeing Return to Red Sea Route, Shares Fall
top_signals.summary: A.P. Moller-Maersk A/S and Hapag-Lloyd AG signaled confidence about resuming passage through the Red Sea, sending the container carriers’ shares down on expectation a return to the shorter route will ease capacity constraints and temper a surge in shipping rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Saudis Slash Main Oil Price to Rare Discount as Market Dives
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia made big reductions to its main crude oil prices for buyers in Asia, selling barrels at a discount for the first time since it embarked on a price war in 2020, as a surge of global supply heightens competition to find buyers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices little changed after OPEC+ agrees to raise output targets - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Oil prices little changed after OPEC+ agrees to raise output targets  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Russia’s largest bank Sber targets early December crypto wallet launch: report
top_signals.summary: Sberbank plans a crypto wallet and digital depository in Sber apps by early December pending Russia’s new digital asset law.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Max severity Adobe ColdFusion flaw now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers are now exploiting a maximum-severity Adobe ColdFusion vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-48282, the Canadian Center for Cyber Security (CCCS) warned on Thursday. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
